text:
## Tijl Coosemans (tijl@FreeBSD.org):

> I still cannot reproduce it even with the previous version installed
> while building the new version.  If you have the time could you try to
> reproduce it and email me the build/install log?  If not I think I'll
> just close the PR.

Of course, here we are, typescript attached.

Regards,
Christoph
